news_signals.title: Transportation awards Google major contract after 'OneGov' deal
news_signals.snippet: # Transportation awards Google major contract after ‘OneGov’ deal. The Department of Transportation has inked a deal for Google’s Workspace software suite using discounted rates made possible through the company’s April ‘OneGov’ agreement with the General Services Administration. Google declined to comment for this story and the Transportation Department was unable to comment due to the government

news_signals.title: Google CEO urges employees to move faster and 'stay scrappy'
news_signals.snippet: # Google CEO urges employees to move faster and ‘stay scrappy’ ahead of pivotal year in AI, report says. A top priority is “building big, new business,” including the AI-powered Gemini app, Pichai said, adding that scaling it for consumers will be “our biggest focus next year.”. Despite the growing competition Google faces, Liz Reid, the company’s vice president of search, dismissed the pessimism

news_signals.title: Google CEO Pichai tells employees to gear up for big 2025 - Reddit
news_signals.snippet: “I expect some back and forth” in 2025, Pichai said. “I think we'll be state of the art.” He acknowledged that Google has had to play catchup.
